overall.description: A stationary cinematic view of a rain-drenched cyberpunk metropolis at night, featuring towering neon-lit skyscrapers, an elevated highway with moving traffic, and reflective wet streets. The scene appears to be rendered in a game engine with atmospheric haze and vibrant neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking neon-lit commercial street

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green
pedestrian with umbrella reaches far end of street and becomes smaller in frame

agents.ego_description: standing still on an elevated walkway, watching the rainy street scene below

notable_agents.action: walking away from camera down the rain-soaked street carrying an umbrella

entered.detail: tall glass building covered in bright neon advertisements and holographic displays
raised roadway with vehicles moving across, visible through the rain
vertical traffic signal showing red then changing to green
large illuminated sign with neon graphics and text
wet metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
tall pole with multiple fixtures casting light on the scene

segments.scene_description: A stationary viewpoint from an elevated pedestrian walkway captures a cyberpunk city street during a heavy downpour at night. Neon-lit skyscrapers tower in the background while a lone pedestrian with an umbrella walks away down the glistening street. The traffic light changes from red to green as vehicles pass on the elevated highway in the mid-ground, their lights diffused by the rain and atmospheric haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary, cinematic perspective of a rain-drenched cyberpunk metropolis that emphasizes the rhythmic flow of urban life under a heavy downpour. It begins from an elevated pedestrian walkway, looking down upon a glistening street where a lone pedestrian with an umbrella walks away into the distance. As the atmospheric haze diffuses the glow of towering neon skyscrapers, the focus shifts toward the mid-ground where an elevated highway carries a stream of passing vehicles. The scene then culminates as the traffic light transitions from red to green, allowing the blurred lights of the city's traffic to surge forward through the falling rain.
